statement: The lipid mechanism reproduces the long-chain shoot without degrading the root or the short/mid-chain fits (a clean single-mechanism fix).

confidence.basis: qualitative judge: Decisive: the single-pool lipid term reproduces shoot at the COST of root -- PFUnDA root 20.6->3.9, PFDoDA root 159->4.4 (now under vs obs 69/19.5) -- and PFDoDA shoot is still ~3-4x under. Not a clean cost-free fix; it needs a 2-pool (free + lipid-bound) split so the bound pool feeds the shoot without draining the root, plus a residual long-chain mechanism.
